scaffold.details: Update tui/Cargo.toml with reqwest=0.11, serde=1.0, tokio=1, ratatui, crossterm. Create skeleton: tui/src/main.rs, tui/src/app.rs, tui/src/network.rs, tui/src/ui.rs.

route_mapping.details: Read backend/main.py. Find exactly the REST route to get jobs. Extract JSON schema (fields: wall_time_ms, cpu_time_sec, cpu_percent, max_rss_kb, exit_code_int). Note it down here under 'routes' section.

tdd_logic_implementation.details: Implement core logic in app.rs and network.rs to pass failing tests. Cycle through windows and metrics, and implement JSON parsing.

visuals_integration.details: Implement TUI visuals in ui.rs and main event loop in main.rs. Split screen into Header and Body. Implement metric chart using Sparkline.

polish.details: Install panic hook, run cargo fmt, and cleanup task state.

list_jobs.note: Currently only "limit" is supported. Dynamic filtering by time (e.g. past 1h) is not yet implemented in the backend.
